INTRO.TITLE: An Agency That Brings Your Ideas to Life
INTRO.P1: L'Événement Peter is your trusted event partner. Based in Rennes, our agency operates throughout France and internationally to create memorable experiences for couples, businesses and families who place their trust in us.
INTRO.P2: Our team works with passion, expertise and commitment to offer you a premium, fully personalised service. Choosing L'Événement Peter means you can be certain that every detail will be handled to perfection.

ITEMS.title: Tailor-made

ITEMS.title: Local and International Expertise
ITEMS.desc: Rooted in Rennes and backed by an international background, we combine local knowledge with global experience for a perfect wedding or event.

ITEMS.title: Total Peace of Mind
ITEMS.desc: We manage every detail so you can fully enjoy your day without stress or surprises. Your peace of mind is our priority.

ITEMS.title: Premium Quality

HERO.DESC: Wedding planner based in Rennes, L'Événement Peter orchestrates every detail of your wedding with passion and expertise. From the first consultation to the last note, we create the event you have always dreamed of.

INTRO.TITLE: The Art of Planning a Wedding
INTRO.P1: Planning a wedding requires in-depth knowledge of vendors, exceptional venues, trends and the specific logistical subtleties of each destination. That is why L'Événement Peter is your indispensable partner.
INTRO.P2: From Rennes, our agency operates throughout France and internationally to organise weddings worthy of your dreams, whether an intimate ceremony or a grand reception.
INTRO.P3: Wedding planner, on-the-day coordinator, or simply an expert consultation: we tailor our involvement to your needs and budget.

ITEMS.title: Full Coordination
ITEMS.desc: From sourcing vendors to coordinating on the wedding day. We orchestrate every moment so you can experience your wedding serenely.

ITEMS.title: Wedding Day Management
ITEMS.desc: Already planned everything? We step in on the day to coordinate vendors, timings and any unexpected situations. Enjoy without worrying about a thing.

ITEMS.title: Partial Support
ITEMS.desc: Targeted assistance: venue search, vendor negotiation, schedule creation… We adapt our involvement to your specific needs.

ITEMS.title: Full-Service Wedding
ITEMS.desc: Entrust us with the entire organisation. We manage every detail from A to Z for an exceptional wedding anywhere in the world.

INCLUS.TITLE: What We Organise for You
ITEMS: Search and selection of the reception venue
Coordination with all vendors (caterer, photographer, DJ, band, florist…)
Creation of the planning schedule and day programme
Organisation of the civil and/or secular ceremony
Management of invitations, seating plan and accommodation
On-the-day coordination: welcome, timing, handling of any issues
Advice on wedding decoration and design
INCLUS.DESIGN_NOTE: Looking for bespoke decoration? Discover our page

ZONE.TITLE: Weddings in France & Worldwide
ZONE.P1: Our wedding planning agency in Rennes operates throughout France and internationally for weddings: Rennes, Paris, Nice, destination venues and exceptional estates around the world.
ZONE.P2: Every wedding is unique. Our broad experience allows us to find the most beautiful venues and the most talented vendors for your most exclusive day.

CTA.TEXT: Contact us for a no-obligation first meeting. We will explore your project together and suggest the most suitable package.

HERO.DESC: From floral creation to full staging, L'Événement Peter transforms your spaces into living works of art. A wedding design that reflects who you are.

INTRO.TITLE: More Than a Décor — A Sensory Experience
INTRO.P1: Wedding decoration is far more than aesthetics: it is the art of creating an atmosphere, an emotion, a memory. At L'Événement Peter, every detail is crafted to elevate your celebration.
INTRO.P2: Our designers work on floral decoration, spatial staging, furniture, lighting and all the visual elements that shape the visual identity of your wedding in Rennes and beyond.
INTRO.P3: Whether you have a precise vision in mind or would like to be guided, we co-create with you the décor that reveals your personality and enchants your guests.

ITEMS.title: Floral Creation
ITEMS.desc: Bridal bouquets, floral arches, centrepieces, buttonholes, compositions for the church or reception hall. Handcrafted work with fresh, seasonal flowers.

ITEMS.title: Staging & Decoration
ITEMS.desc: Full styling of the reception venue: tables, central aisle, photo wall, cocktail space, children's corner. Every space tells a story.

ITEMS.title: Lighting & Ambiance
ITEMS.desc: Fairy lights, candelabras, spotlights, warm lighting… Lighting completely transforms the atmosphere and creates unforgettable photographs.

ITEMS.title: Stationery & Signage
ITEMS.desc: Menu cards, seating plans, place cards, save-the-dates, ceremony booklets… Cohesive stationery that adorns every moment.

ITEMS.title: Moodboard & Art Direction
ITEMS.desc: We define together your colour palette, materials and inspirations to create a coherent and elegant visual thread throughout the day.

ITEMS.title: Setup & Breakdown
ITEMS.desc: On the day, our team installs all the decoration before your arrival and manages the breakdown at the end of the evening. You have nothing to do.

ITEMS.label: Romantic & Timeless
ITEMS.desc: White roses, candles and fine linens for a classic and elegant wedding.

ITEMS.label: Bohemian & Nature
ITEMS.desc: Pampas grass, eucalyptus, macramé and terracotta tones for a free-spirited and warm atmosphere.

ITEMS.label: Minimalist & Luxury
ITEMS.desc: Clean lines, marble, gold and monochrome flowers for a contemporary aesthetic.

ITEMS.label: Rustic & Countryside
ITEMS.desc: Raw wood, wildflowers and string lights for a charming, idyllic wedding.

ITEMS.label: Heritage Wedding
ITEMS.desc: Embroidery, slate, linen and wildflowers for a celebration rooted in timeless tradition.

ITEMS.label: Fully Tailor-Made
ITEMS.desc: Your world, your palette, your vision. We create the unique décor that is entirely you.

CTA.TEXT: Share your inspirations, date and venue. We create a personalised moodboard at our first meeting.

HERO.DESC: L'Événement Peter designs and organises your professional events. Internal events, brand image, marketing events: memorable experiences that energise your teams and strengthen your brand.

INTRO.TITLE: Corporate event planning at the service of your success
INTRO.P1: At L'Événement Peter, we understand the crucial importance of your professional events for your brand image, partnerships, teams and overall success. Gala evening, inauguration, award ceremony… every event is an opportunity to stand out, make a bold statement and leave a memorable mark.
INTRO.P2: Our experienced and passionate team transforms your ideas into reality through a comprehensive range of premium services, designed to meet your most demanding needs. From finding the ideal venue to on-the-day coordination, we take full responsibility for your event.
INTRO.P3: Our commitment to excellence and attention to detail guarantee an unparalleled experience, where every aspect is carefully orchestrated to achieve your objectives and impress your guests.

POURQUOI_NOUS.TITLE: Why choose L'Événement Peter?
POURQUOI_NOUS.CLOSING: By choosing L'Événement Peter, you choose competence, innovation and total satisfaction. Trust our expertise to bring your vision to life and propel your company to new heights.

CTA.TEXT: Date, number of participants, event type, budget… Share your brief and receive a detailed proposal within 48 hours.

HERO.DESC: Alix and Ingrid Peter, mother and daughter, unite their skills to create unique events. An agency built on passion, excellence and deep experience across destinations.

MAIN.TITLE: Alix and Ingrid Peter, Mother and Daughter
MAIN.P1: Alix and Ingrid Peter, mother and daughter, with a close-knit relationship, decided to join forces and combine their skills to create L'Événement Peter — an event agency dedicated to making your events truly unique.
MAIN.P2: Ingrid, with a career in international commerce, lived many years abroad with her children (USA, Russia, Canada). Back in France, she decided to open a new chapter in her life. Spontaneous, organised and warm-hearted, family values have always been her priority.
MAIN.P3: Alix, born in the United States, lived in many countries, developing a great capacity for adaptation. After artistic studies and specialist training in wedding planning, ceremony officiating and wedding design at Breizh Wedding School, she embarked on this adventure alongside her mother.
MAIN.P4: Our agency knows no borders — we will be delighted to assist you in realising your projects in France or in more exotic destinations. Welcome to the world of L'Événement Peter!

ITEMS.texte: We bring boundless creativity to every project, proposing original concepts and experiences that go beyond the ordinary.
We never compromise on quality. Every vendor, every detail is carefully selected to achieve excellence.
Whether you dream of a traditional, modern, spiritual or non-denominational ceremony, we adapt to your needs and vision.
As a family business, we build a relationship of trust with every client. Your satisfaction and peace of mind are our absolute priority.

LOCAL.TITLE: Rooted in Rennes, Passionate About Our Region
LOCAL.P1: Our region is more than a setting for us — it is our home. This passion for our region is reflected in every event we organise: we know the most beautiful venues, the best local artisans and vendors, and the picture-perfect spots that make your wedding unforgettable.
LOCAL.P2: Based in Rennes, our agency operates throughout France and internationally. From seaside châteaux to country estates, from conference centres to vineyard estates, we know exceptional venues in every destination.

HERO.DESC: Wedding in France or abroad, seminar in Rennes, custom decoration… Share your project. We will respond within 48 hours with a personalised proposal.

HERO.DESC: Because every life deserves to be celebrated with respect and emotion, L'Événement Peter supports you in organising personalised funeral ceremonies, worthy of the person you have lost.

INTRO.TITLE: Honouring a life, your way
INTRO.P1: Faced with the loss of a loved one, organising a ceremony is an emotionally and logistically demanding experience. At L'Événement Peter, we take this burden from you with gentleness, discretion and professionalism, so you can focus fully on grieving and reflection.
INTRO.P2: We believe that every ceremony should reflect the uniqueness of the person who has passed: their tastes, passions, and the moments that shaped their life. Whether you wish for an intimate family ceremony, a colourful celebration of life, or a quiet and reflective gathering, we tailor every detail to your wishes.
INTRO.P3: You are not alone. We are here, every step of the way.

ITEMS.title: Civil ceremony
ITEMS.desc: Writing and hosting a personalised civil ceremony, with carefully chosen readings, music and tributes to honour the memory of the deceased.

ITEMS.title: Celebration of life
ITEMS.desc: A positive and colourful celebration that tells the story, passions and legacy of the person who has passed. A farewell filled with love and light.

ITEMS.title: Full coordination
ITEMS.desc: We handle all logistics: venue, flowers, music, suppliers, programme. All you need to do is be present and experience the moment.

ITEMS.title: Music & atmosphere
ITEMS.desc: Bespoke music selection, live musicians or a curated playlist to accompany the ceremony with pieces that held meaning for them.

ITEMS.title: Floral decoration
ITEMS.desc: Floral arrangements crafted by our decoration team, in the deceased's favourite colours and flowers, for a moving visual tribute.

ITEMS.title: Support & guidance
ITEMS.desc: We guide you through difficult decisions with kindness and without judgement, at your pace, respecting your beliefs and needs.

ITEMS.title: Complete discretion
ITEMS.desc: Every family is unique. We work in full confidentiality, with total respect for your privacy and your choices.

ITEMS.title: Immediate availability
ITEMS.desc: We respond quickly to your request and adapt to your timelines, even short ones. You can count on us.

ITEMS.title: Full personalisation
ITEMS.desc: Nothing is standard. Every ceremony is tailored from your memories, your story and your wishes.

ITEMS.title: Human support
ITEMS.desc: Beyond logistics, we are here with empathy and warmth. You are not a client — you are family.

CTA.TEXT: Whether urgently or in advance to plan a ceremony, our team responds with kindness and discretion. Let's talk together.

CAROUSEL.TITLE: Ceremonies organised with care and dignity

HERO.DESC: L'Événement Peter celebrates your most precious life moments with personalised secular ceremonies, written and hosted with sincerity, emotion and elegance.

INTRO.TITLE: More than a host — your voice for a moment
INTRO.P1: The role of a ceremony officiant is to put words to what you feel. At our first meeting, we take the time to get to know you — your stories, emotions, and what defines you — to build together a script that is 100% you.
INTRO.P2: Every ceremony is unique. No generic text, no recycled script: everything is written bespoke, reviewed together and adjusted until every word feels right.
INTRO.P3: Based in Rennes, we officiate throughout Brittany and internationally.

ITEMS.title: Wedding & Civil Union
ITEMS.desc: A deeply personalised secular union ceremony, with vows, readings, music and rituals chosen together. The most beautiful day of your life, told in your own words.

ITEMS.title: Vow renewal
ITEMS.desc: After 5, 10, 20 years… renewing your vows is a powerful act of love. We create a moving ceremony that celebrates the journey you have shared.

ITEMS.title: Birth & civil naming ceremony
ITEMS.desc: Welcome your child into your family with a beautiful secular celebration, surrounded by your loved ones. A joyful, loving moment to cherish forever.

ITEMS.title: Funeral ceremony
ITEMS.desc: A dignified, sincere and personalised tribute to honour the memory of a loved one. We work hand in hand with the family to create a farewell worthy of the person who has passed.

STEPS.title: The meeting
STEPS.desc: A first exchange in person or by video call to get to know you, understand your expectations and your story.

STEPS.title: The writing
STEPS.desc: We write your bespoke script, review it together and adjust until every word feels exactly right.

STEPS.title: The rehearsal
STEPS.desc: An on-site or remote rehearsal to confirm the flow, timing and logistical details.

STEPS.title: The ceremony
STEPS.desc: The big day: we host your ceremony with warmth, ease and professionalism, for an unforgettable moment.

CTA.TEXT: Every ceremony is unique. Contact us to discuss and receive a personalised quote.

HERO.DESC: Gala evening, inauguration, awards ceremony, team-building… L'Événement Peter designs exceptional corporate events that unite, motivate and build connection.

INTRO.TITLE: An event that reflects your company, for your teams
INTRO.P1: A successful internal event is not simply a well-organised evening: it is a strategic moment for your company. It strengthens cohesion, recognises your people and conveys your values. It is an investment in your company culture.
INTRO.P2: At L'Événement Peter, we handle the entire organisation: from the creative concept to on-the-day coordination, including supplier selection, decoration and logistics.

ITEMS.title: Gala evening
ITEMS.desc: An exceptional evening to reward your teams, celebrate an achievement or mark a key milestone. Red carpet, luxury decoration, gourmet dinner and premium entertainment.

ITEMS.title: Inauguration
ITEMS.desc: New headquarters, new agency, site opening… We orchestrate your inauguration to make it memorable: ribbon cutting, cocktail reception, speeches and entertainment.

ITEMS.title: Awards & trophy ceremony
ITEMS.desc: Recognise your talent with an elegant, well-paced awards ceremony. Staging, speeches, trophy presentations, cocktail dinner… we handle everything.

ITEMS.title: Team-building
ITEMS.desc: Original, tailor-made activities to strengthen team cohesion: creative workshops, group challenges, giant escape games, outdoor activities in Brittany.

ITEMS.title: Year-end party
ITEMS.desc: Close the year in style! We create a festive and convivial evening that brings your people together in a warm and memorable atmosphere.

ITEMS.title: Cocktail & afterwork
ITEMS.desc: Team meeting, celebrating a success, welcoming new staff… Convivial moments organised with care to build connection.

ITEMS.title: Listening & bespoke
ITEMS.desc: Every company is unique. We co-create your event around your objectives, culture and budget.

ITEMS.title: International network
ITEMS.desc: Based in Rennes, we operate throughout France and internationally with a curated network of premium suppliers.

ITEMS.title: Reliability & responsiveness
ITEMS.desc: Deadlines met, seamless coordination, smooth handling of the unexpected. Count on us on the day and throughout planning.

ITEMS.title: Creativity & innovation
ITEMS.desc: Fresh concepts, original entertainment and refined staging to surprise your teams and leave a lasting impression.

CTA.TEXT: Seminar, gala, awards ceremony… Share your project and receive a bespoke proposal.

HERO.DESC: Product launch, press evening, brand experience, influencer event… L'Événement Peter creates events that amplify your brand and leave a lasting impression.

INTRO.TITLE: The event as an extension of your brand
INTRO.P1: A successful brand event is not simply a beautiful occasion: it is an immersive experience that embodies your values, tells your story and creates a deep emotional connection with your audience. Every detail — from the venue to the staging, the speech and the atmosphere — must be the exact reflection of who you are.
INTRO.P2: L'Événement Peter works in total alignment with your brand identity, guidelines and communication objectives to create high-impact events.

ITEMS.title: Product / collection launch
ITEMS.desc: Reveal your new product or collection with an event that builds anticipation and drives impact. Theatrical staging, live demos, press kits, media coverage.

ITEMS.title: Press & media evening
ITEMS.desc: Invite journalists, bloggers and influencers to discover your brand in an exceptional setting. Integrated PR, press dossier, media content.

ITEMS.title: Brand experience
ITEMS.desc: Ephemeral showroom, immersive pop-up, brand activation… Create a unique sensory experience that immerses your audience in your brand universe.

ITEMS.title: Partner & VIP client evening
ITEMS.desc: Treat your strategic partners and VIP clients to an exclusive evening that strengthens the relationship and acknowledges their commitment.

ITEMS.title: Influencer event
ITEMS.desc: Bring your influencer community together for a unique, Instagrammable and memorable experience to amplify your brand visibility.

ITEMS.title: Brand conference
ITEMS.desc: Keynote, round table, annual presentation… We script your communication so it is impactful, memorable and perfectly aligned with your brand image.

ITEMS.title: Brand consistency
ITEMS.desc: Every detail of the event is designed in alignment with your visual identity, values and positioning.

ITEMS.title: Impact & memorability
ITEMS.desc: We craft experiences that stay with people, create emotion and generate positive word of mouth.

ITEMS.title: Coverage & content
ITEMS.desc: We plan for key moments to maximise photo/video coverage and content creation for your social channels.

CTA.EYEBROW: Let's bring your brand to life
CTA.TEXT: Launch, press evening, brand experience… Share your brief and receive a creative proposal.

HERO.DESC: Trade show, road show, brand activation, conference, client day… L'Événement Peter designs marketing events that meet your objectives and exceed your expectations.

INTRO.TITLE: Events in service of your strategy
INTRO.P1: A well-designed marketing event is one of the most powerful levers for generating leads, retaining clients and building brand awareness. But its effectiveness depends entirely on its conception, execution and the measurement of results.
INTRO.P2: L'Événement Peter supports you from strategy to debrief, including production, logistics and communications. We work as an extension of your marketing team.

ITEMS.title: Trade show
ITEMS.desc: Design and management of your stand or trade show presence: design, logistics, animation, visitor welcome and lead follow-up.

ITEMS.title: Road show
ITEMS.desc: Deploy your message across multiple cities or countries with a turnkey road show: travelling concept, multi-site logistics, brand consistency.

ITEMS.title: Brand activation
ITEMS.desc: Interactive experiences in retail spaces, public areas or third-party events to create surprise and engagement.

ITEMS.title: Conference & Summit
ITEMS.desc: Full organisation of your conferences, forums and summits: programme, speakers, venue, live streaming, post-event content.

ITEMS.title: Client day
ITEMS.desc: Retain your clients with a dedicated day: workshops, practical sessions, exclusive visits, prestige lunch and memorable experiences.

ITEMS.title: Launch event
ITEMS.desc: Launch of an offer, service or partnership: presentation event with keynote, demos and media coverage.

ITEMS.title: Clear objectives
ITEMS.desc: Every event is designed around measurable goals: leads, awareness, engagement, retention.

ITEMS.title: International reach
ITEMS.desc: We operate in France and internationally with a trusted network of local partners.

ITEMS.title: Flawless execution
ITEMS.desc: Rigorous planning, risk anticipation, on-the-day coordination for a result that delivers.

ITEMS.title: Return on investment
ITEMS.desc: We measure the impact of your events and provide a full post-event report.

CTA.TEXT: Trade show, road show, conference… Share your brief and receive a strategic, bespoke proposal.

HERO.DESC: From birthdays to Divorce Parties and themed evenings, L'Événement Peter creates unique and memorable celebrations, entirely personalised to your desires.

WELCOME.TITLE: The art of celebrating life, your way
WELCOME.P1: Every moment of your life deserves to be celebrated with intention and creativity. At L'Événement Peter, we understand that behind every party lies a story, an emotion, a desire to share something unique with the people you love.
WELCOME.P2: Whether you are planning a memorable birthday, an extravagant Divorce Party to turn the page with flair, or an immersive themed evening, our passionate team is by your side at every step. Tailor-made decoration, entertainment, catering, music… we orchestrate every detail so all you have to do is enjoy the moment.
WELCOME.P3: Together, let's transform your ideas into an event that is truly yours — one you will remember for the rest of your life.

ITEMS.title: Birthday
ITEMS.desc: Whether you are celebrating your 18th, your 40th or a golden anniversary, every birthday deserves to shine. We organise your party from A to Z: tailor-made decoration, entertainment, catering, music… A celebration entirely in your image.

ITEMS.title: Divorce Party
ITEMS.desc: Turn the page in style! A Divorce Party is the perfect occasion to celebrate your newfound freedom with those closest to you. Our team creates a festive, uninhibited and memorable evening to begin this new chapter with flair.

ITEMS.title: Themed Evening
ITEMS.desc: From the Roaring Twenties to the tropics, from cinema to time travel… We transform your vision into a fully immersive experience. Décor, entertainment, gastronomy: every detail is designed to transport you to another world.

THEME.TITLE: Live a Unique and Immersive Experience
THEME.P1: Imagine being transported into a world where every detail is meticulously orchestrated to immerse you in a unique experience. Whether you dream of an elegant evening inspired by the Roaring Twenties, an exotic party under the tropics, or a celebration in homage to your favourite film, we bring your desires to life with creativity.
THEME.P2: Our event experts work in close collaboration with you to bring your boldest ideas to life. From initial concept to final execution, we do everything in our power to ensure your evening meets your expectations — and exceeds them.
THEME.P3: Every detail is carefully considered, from breathtaking decoration to the selection of food and drinks, as well as the entertainment that will animate your evening from start to finish.
THEME.P4: Contact us today to start planning your dream evening!
